question.label: Design API mismatch
question.name: When design and API details do not match, what is usually unclear first?
question.description: Drills into the mismatch he named so the manager can identify the exact ambiguity to remove.

answer: I am not always sure who should approve what before I push.

assessment.note: He names approval ownership before pushing as the specific ambiguity, which is a mild negative clarity signal; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'who should approve what before I push' not drilled because drill cap requires advancing the arc.

new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
Local setup is better now, but I still lose time when the design and API details do not match.
I am not always sure who should approve what before I push.
